title: Earnings Preview: Marvell Technology (MRVL) Q1 Earnings Expected to Decline
text: Marvell Technology is anticipated to report declining earnings for its first quarter ending April 2024. Wall Street expects a year-over-year contraction in both earnings and revenues. Consensus Estimates: Quarterly EPS of $0.23 per share, representing a year-over-year change of -25.8%; Revenues of $1.15 billion, down 12.9% from the prior-year quarter. The analysis examines Marvell's likelihood of beating consensus estimates using the Zacks Earnings ESP (Expected Surprise Prediction) metric. The Most Accurate Estimate is lower than the Zacks Consensus Estimate, resulting in an Earnings ESP of -0.31%. The company carries a Zacks Rank of #2, though this combination makes it challenging to predict whether Marvell will exceed expectations. Notably, Marvell matched consensus estimates exactly in its most recent quarter, delivering no surprise. Over the past four quarters, the chipmaker has beaten consensus EPS estimates three times. Earnings Release Date: May 30, 2024.
